title: Add a column to a specific view without having to hide it on the rest of the views.

posts.author: alexross (Alex Ross)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently if you add a new column to any view of the board - it will appear on all the views of the same board. So you need to go and hide this new column from the other views.

It would be nice to have options:

  1. if you need to add a column to a specific view - column will be added only to this view (and main table of course), but not to the rest of the views.
  2. if you want a column to appear on all views - you just add it on the main table.

Currently when people start working with the views - they do add columns to a view, but they never pay attention to the fact that this column has actually appeared on the rest of the views, messing them up.

posts.author: YSteinberg (Yoel S)
posts.cookedHtml:
YES PLEASE!!

This is a constant annoyance for us
